subTitle: Shinnosuke and Ellen witness a small ship's sudden explosion, questioning the motive. Meanwhile, Hiroshi discovers a mysterious door.

subTitle: Paranoia grips everyone as Jailbreaker guards the food supply with a laser gun. Meanwhile, the situation suddenly shifts when Shinnosuke mentions seeing Chocobi snacks in a closed-off room.

subTitle: Shin-chan visits Keiko-san at the hospital with Misae and raises a nuisance for the nurse. Consequently, Misae scolds him for his mischief.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: Misae prepares a meal to eat but as she tries to do so, Shin-chan causes a nuisance by playing with the food and annoys her.

title: Sudha Murty's Stories of Wit & Magic
subTitle: In order to buy taiyaki for his mother Misae, Shin-chan visits a store. However, he proceeds to cause a nuisance and annoy the storekeeper.

title: Kicko And Super Speedo
subTitle: When Shin-chan is not able to reach home before his curfew, his mother Misae is left annoyed. As a result, she punishes him.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Shin-chan visits the zoo on a school trip where he causes a nuisance and proceeds to annoy the teachers and the captive animals.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: During a soccer match, Kawamura faces Shin-chan and his friends. However, he underestimates their skills and ends up losing to them.

title: Kicko And Super Speedo
subTitle: Shin-chan takes Shiro for a walk after playing with him. However, Shiro later eats the entirety of the meat Shin-chan's family had put aside for dinner.

title: Crayon Shin-chan Spin-off: O-O-O-No Shinnosuke
subTitle: Shinnosuke and the Nohara family awaken from cold sleep on a drifting space ship. Their cosmic journey unfolds as they navigate life and face challenges aboard the vessel.

title: After School Dice Club
subTitle: Midori becomes defensive when a popular game designer from the U.S. offers to play test her game, and her worst fears come true when Miki and Aya have some complaints after trying it.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: When Naruto and his team open the two scrolls after reaching the tower, Iruka suddenly appears and notifies them that they have passed the second exam.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: A young troublesome teen, Naruto, rises to power as he trains to become one of the most ferocious and powerful ninja in his locality.
